item.title: TreeScheme - ExAraman&Glynn
item.description: Definewe haveSet ThenDefineWe want to haveIn this case, , for .Split the sum in and For ,ThenAdding and subtracting the right term, we obtainFor ,ThenWe take the first term and sum over :Applying summation by parts, we obtainReducing the last term, we getWe take the second and the third termReducing the second term, we getAdding the contribution of the diagonal term , the result of the summation by parts, and the remaining terms for , we obtainThen, observing the exact cancellation , we obtainWe now estimate the first termBy the asymptotic behavior of , there exist and such that, for every ,Then,Finally, since , we have , so
